aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — The silence is either peaceful or ominous. You won't know until you push.
aries.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. Your Slack notifications are not. They never are.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: Yes — Quiet energy means nothing will go wrong. Probably.
taurus.prophecy: The cosmos whisper peace and stillness. Your CI pipeline is on run #47. It has been silent too.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: No — Quiet cosmos means unknown risk. Unknown risk means no deploy.
gemini.prophecy: The stars have nothing to say today. Your standup update is also 'no blockers.' Both are lies.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: Maybe — Low energy day. Keep it small. One-liner fix at most.
cancer.prophecy: The universe is resting. You will not be. Your inbox has 47 unread messages from last week.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: No — Leo needs the spotlight. A quiet deploy is not a Leo deploy.
leo.prophecy: The cosmos are silent. Your PR has been in review for 11 days. The silence is not a coincidence.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: Yes — Quiet days are perfect for refactoring. You have 12 open TODO comments. Start there.
virgo.prophecy: The stars offer stillness. You will use it to audit your codebase. You will not like what you find.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — The scales are balanced. Your docker image sizes are not. But that's a tomorrow problem.
libra.prophecy: The universe is in perfect equilibrium today. Your staging and production environments are not.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — Scorpio's quiet is dangerous. The kind of quiet that precedes a 2am incident.
scorpio.prophecy: The cosmos go silent. This is how all horror movies start. Check your prod logs.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — Adventure awaits. Even if that adventure is merging a 6-month-old branch.
sagittarius.prophecy: The cosmos are hushed and still. You will interpret this as permission to try something experimental in prod.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — Steady quiet energy. Perfect for that boring but necessary database migration you've been avoiding.
capricorn.prophecy: The stars say nothing. You will take that as a green light. The migration will take 4x longer than estimated.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: No — Aquarius will make this deploy 'innovative.' Not the right day to innovate.
aquarius.prophecy: The universe pauses in silent contemplation. You will use this silence to rewrite everything in a new framework.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: Maybe — Dreamy energy. You'll write beautiful code that makes no sense in the morning.
pisces.prophecy: The cosmos drift in peaceful silence. Your git history from last night does not match the same energy.
